title: (LEGACY4J) TU0 Panorama
description: Brings back the panorama from Legacy Console's TU0
body:
Brings the TU0 Panorama back, for nostalgia purposes.

# 📜 History

This panorama was introduced in the original base game of Minecraft: Xbox 360 Edition, and was used until TU5 (the version that added hunger), where it was changed in the next update. It is a panorama of the original tutorial world at the time, with a blur put over it. 

Learn more about panoramas [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Panorama).

# 📝 NOTE:
**NEEDS [LEGACY 4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)**

The panorama is not by me, it is by 4J Studios, ripped from the game directly. All property in this texture pack belongs to 4J Studios.
